nextCommands: moon run client:fix && moon run client:typecheck
summary: Implemented 3 remaining gap items from architect plan: (1) Added rollNotation(options) method to DiceService interface and class — rolls count×sides dice, pushes combined total to history, returns sum. (2) Added 5 rollNotation tests covering d20 range, 2d6 range, d100 range, 4d6 range, and history push verification — all 9 dice_service tests pass. (3) Updated CombatViewModel: imported diceService from $services barrel, replaced private _simulateDiceRoll() call with diceService.rollNotation() in resolveAllRolls(), removed the private _simulateDiceRoll() method. Dev sandbox page at /dev/combat-enhancements and E2E POM navigation already existed from prior coder. fix+typecheck: 0 errors. 7 pre-existing test failures in combat_log_enrichment.test.ts (parseDiceFromLog/parseDamageFromLog regex bugs) — unrelated to these changes.
